basics.name: Xiaoqi Qin
basics.label: Sophomore Undergraduate Researcher in World Models & Embodied AI
basics.summary: Interested in video world models, World-Action Models (WAMs), and generalizable embodied intelligence. Hands-on experience with a 14B-parameter action-conditioned video generation model on 8×H20 GPUs. Strong self-learning ability; effective collaborator in a remote research team.

work.name: Peking University — Prof. Hao Tang's Lab
work.summary: Multi-view video world models, targeting NeurIPS 2026 submission.
highlights: Built the complete fine-tuning pipeline for a 14B-parameter action-conditioned video generation model: game data preprocessing, model adaptation to training framework, and LoRA fine-tuning on 8×H20 GPUs.
Surveyed multi-view generation approaches (MultiGen, PERSIST, ShareVerse) and presented comparative analysis at group meetings to inform the project's technical direction.

awards.title: National Scholarship for Undergraduates
awards.summary: Awarded to top undergraduate students nationwide; 10,000 CNY.

interests.name: World-Action Models (WAMs)
keywords: Jointly modeling video and actions for robot policy learning

interests.name: Embodied AI
keywords: Deploying world models on real robotic platforms
